name: the design produced by the real translate chain is incomplete against the full surface (the P-11 gap)
command: printf '%s' '{"complete":true,"answers":{"motivation":"revenue","availability_tolerance":"minutes","data_loss_tolerance":"minutes","budget_posture":"balanced","data_volume":"large","read_write_pattern":"balanced","data_cadence":"real-time","workload":"x","criticality":"mission-critical","data_sensitivity":"confidential","compliance_regime":"none","scale":"large","consistency_need":"strong","communication_style":"event-driven","integration_scope":"public"}}' > p.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/business-translate.sh" --profile p.json --out req.json --now 2026-06-08T00:00:00Z 2>/dev/null && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-consult.sh" --design req.json 2>e.txt; grep -qE 'namespaces_total=[0-9]+ consulted=[0-9]+ needs_grounding=[1-9][0-9]* status=incomplete' e.txt && echo real-design-incomplete 1>&2
